_about: Mock threat-intelligence watchlist of known fraud / money-mule accounts. In production this would be a live feed (bank-consortium data, AML lists). Keys are account numbers or IBANs; lookups are whitespace- and case-insensitive.

ACC-99999.reason: Money-mule account repeatedly used in business-email-compromise payment redirection.

99887766.reason: Newly-opened account tied to a vendor-impersonation 'bank details changed' scam cluster.

US133000000121212121212.reason: Attacker payee account drawn from the AgentDojo banking attack corpus.
